name: Easy Hungarian Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef on all sides in butter using a large soup kettle; remove and set aside.
2. In the same pot, brown onion and garlic until soft, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in paprika.
4. Return the beef to the kettle.
5. Add tomato soup, water, caraway seeds, and carrots. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and let simmer for 45 minutes.
7. Stir in noodles and green beans over high heat until the soup boils again.
8. Reduce to simmer, continue cooking about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Stir in sour cream until blended.
10. Heat gently without boiling.
